empty.noConfigFields: This capability has no configurable fields.

help.environmentOverride: Environment variables may override saved settings.
help.chooseModelThenSave: Choose a model, then Save to store it in the LLM capability config.
help.fallbackOrder: Runtime fallback order: session override, agent override, manifest, default model profile, then legacy/env fallback.
help.defaultModelProfileFallback: Runtime fallback order: session override, agent override, manifest, default model profile, then legacy/env fallback.
help.legacyReadonly: Legacy provider, base URL, and model fields are retained only as readonly fallback config when no model profile is resolved.
help.reasoningOutput: Reasoning output declares expected output behavior only. It does not change provider request parameters.
help.profileKey: Used by agent manifests as llm.profile. This currently maps to API alias.
help.llamaCppAlias: llama.cpp usually reports the currently served model. Use --alias for a stable model ID if needed.
help.llamaCppProviderModelList: llama.cpp usually reports the currently served model. Use --alias for a stable model ID if needed.
help.internalProviderRoot: Scans data/models/llms, data/models/embeddings, and data/models/rerankers locally. Base URL and API key are not used.
help.internalLlmProfilesOnly: LLM Model Profiles can select only refs under llm/ from this internal provider.
help.runtimeDevice: Uses torch / transformers / sentence-transformers device semantics for internal transformers models. GPU availability depends on the installed torch backend.
help.gpuLayers: Uses llama.cpp GPU layer offload semantics, which are separate from torch devices. Use 0 for CPU only, -1 to offload as much as possible, or a positive layer count.

results.providerReturnedNoChatModels: Provider returned models, but none are chat/LLM models.

errors.copyCommandFailed: Failed to copy command. Select and copy it manually.
